Jira Service Management templates
More projects.
More agents.
Less chaos.
Jira orchestrates across your AI tech stack—turning plans into actions and shipped work.
Work email
*
Use a work email to find teammates and get access to Rovo AI
Sign up
Or continue with
Google
Video not supported.
Video not supported.
Wherever you need it, Jira’s on it
Whether you set it up yourself or let Rovo do it for you, Jira adapts to how your team ships.
In your AI tech stack
Update work items directly from Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Github Copilot, or any CLI via the Atlassian MCP.
In agentic workflows
Connect agents from any system and keep humans and agents in sync.
With 3K+ integrations
Slack, Github, Figma, Google Docs, all connect seamlessly.
In your process
Flexible workflows means Jira fits perfectly into any team's way of working.
Accelerate your team’s vision with AI
Connect plans, tracking, and AI agents in one place—turning big ideas into shipped work.
Deliver more with AI agents
Jira agents use your project history and institutional knowledge to deliver real outputs—not generic suggestions.
Start projects in seconds
Pull context across people, projects, and code so you can make decisions with the full picture.
Automate the admin
Rovo updates status, writes summaries, and communicates progress across your team so you can focus on delivery instead of admin.
Deliver more with AI agents
Jira agents use your project history and institutional knowledge to deliver real outputs—not generic suggestions.

Automate the admin

Jira agents, get to work
Orchestrate your entire tech stack with context and control.

Discover Teamwork Graph

Read report
Every team starts with Jira
Flexible views, custom workflows, and no-code automation that adapt to how any team works.
Software development
Track bugs, ship releases, skip the status meetings.
Marketing
Plan campaigns, manage creative workflows, and launch on time.
Project management
Manage service requests, track incidents, and keep operations running smoothly.
IT
Coordinate timelines, track deliverables, and ship projects across any team.
Fit for teams big and small
Teams of all types turn teamwork into results with Jira.
Read all stories
Agents in Jira raise the floor for what every team can do. You don't need to be an engineer or an AI expert. If you work in Jira, you get access to the same agentic patterns and automations. That's the real power—capability becomes a property of the system, not just the individual.”
MATTHEW HARGREAVES, Head of Product Delivery and Automation
Read Story
Our whole dev pipeline and planning process runs through [Jira]. It's driving a lot of the business.”
MATT CHESTER, Senior System Engineer
Read Story
[Jira] makes life easier. [We] can spend time on adding value, not busywork.”
JOE COTANT, Senior Technical Program Manager
Read Story
Jira helps our teams stay connected. Plans gives us a single source of truth where we can plan and track different projects across different teams. This brings our non-IT teams into the fold and creates greater visibility and transparency of everyone's work.”
ROB MULVANEY, Sr. Manager - Agile Transformation Office
Read Story
Marketing teams manage their work as sprints in Jira. Sprints aren't just for technical teams – they're for marketing and business teams too.”
SARAH BROWN, Vice President of Marketing
Read Story
One project took 18 months to get up and running. After adopting Atlassian and learning more valuable ways to use the tools, the next one took six months. By tracking everything in Jira and all of our dev tools, we reduced the cost to get the team set up and deliver the product from $2.8 million to $600,000.”
RYAN MOSLEY, Chief of Factory & Engineering Modernization
Read Story
Unlock human+AI teamwork, in one collection
Get Rovo, Jira, Confluence, and Loom in one collection. Bring AI insights to your projects, knowledge, and video communication, all in one place.
Explore Collection
See pricing
Get started with
Jira
No matter what you’re trying to dream up, Jira helps you get it done.
Get Jira free

Privacy policy
Notice at Collection
Terms
Impressum
Language selector
English
▾
Manage Preferences
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Accept all
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Unlock AI-powered teamwork with access to Rovo Search, Chat, and Rovo Agents. Streamline project management with integrated AI features that simplify setting up, tracking, and collaborating across work.

Advanced admin controls and security

Enterprise-grade identity and access management

Atlassian Guard Standard
included.
Unlimited automation rule runs
Increase efficiency by replacing manual, time-consuming work with automated processes and workflows.
Multiple sites (up to 150)
Enable data isolation and administrative autonomy. Customize each instance to the needs of the teams who use it.
24/7 support for all issues
30-min response time for critical issues with dedicated phone number and senior support team.
99.95% uptime SLA

In Jira, teams use issues to track individual pieces of work that must be completed. Depending on how your team uses Jira, an issue could represent a project task, a helpdesk ticket, a leave request form, etc.

The backlog is a type of to-do list for your Jira project. Backlogs are dedicated spaces for keeping track of tasks that you want to do in the future.

User limit per site
This is the maximum number of users or user licenses you can add to each Jira site.
Free
10 users
Standard
100,000 users
Premium
100,000 users
Enterprise
100,000 users
Number of sites
This is the number of sites (also called “instances”) you can license based on the subscription plan you choose. One site is typically enough for most small to medium organizations.
Enterprise subscribers often opt for multiple sites, up to 150 per product, to:
Offer organizational autonomy to independent brands
Improve security through separating data by region or department
Customize instances based on Marketplace apps, project configurations, and more
Learn more
about instances in Jira.
Free
1 site
Standard
1 site
Premium
1 site
Enterprise
Up to 150
Storage
Products in the Jira suite and Confluence all come with their own file storage space.
Learn more
about storage.
Free
2 GB file storage
Standard
250 GB file storage
Premium
Unlimited file storage
Enterprise
Unlimited file storage
Email notifications
Our Free plan for Jira lets you send a maximum of 100 email notifications each day. After 100 emails, your notifications will be paused until the following day. Upgrade to a paid plan to send unlimited email notifications.
Free
100 emails per day
Standard
Unlimited
Premium
Unlimited
Enterprise
Unlimited
User roles and permissions
Assign roles to different users, like administrator or end-user. In the Free plan, every user is a project admin. Different permissions apply to users depending on their role.
Set permissions to control which users can create new projects and what users can do, see, and comment on within a project or issue. Permission settings for projects or issues are only available on paid plans.
Learn more
about users and permissions.
Free
Standard
checked
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Anonymous access
Anonymous access lets people outside of your organization view and create issues without logging in. Allow external partners to see work in progress on joint projects or give customers the ability to submit bugs and feature requests.
Learn more
about anonymous access.
Free
Standard
checked
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Simplify cross-functional work
Advanced planning (Plans)
Plans allow you to plan and track work across multiple teams and projects. Designed for cross-functional visibility and collaboration, advanced planning brings people, work, and goals into a shared space where deliverables are balanced against capacity, dependencies are flagged early on, and real-time updates are readily available to stakeholders.
Learn more
about advanced planning.
Free
Standard
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Dependency management
Dependencies show the relationship between issues in a project or plan. Dependencies within a single team or project can be visualized in the timeline view of a project.
Dependencies across multiple teams and projects can be visualized in a plan using the pre-configured dependency management view or Dependencies tab.
Learn more
about dependency management.
Free
Single Project
Standard
Single Project
Premium
Cross-project
Enterprise
Cross-project
Capacity management
Capacity management is available to teams scheduling work within a plan. Assign work based on capacity and timeframe to create a realistic plan for your teams and set the right expectations with stakeholders.
Learn more
about capacity management.
Free
Standard
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Expandable Issue Hierarchy
In Jira, issue hierarchy levels show the relationship between issue types, from big units of work to small. Expandable issue hierarchy allows you to custom create additional issue levels to visualize everything from quarterly goals down to daily tasks within a plan.
Learn more
about issue hierarchy.
Free
Standard
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Scenario Modeling
Scenarios allow you to explore alternative paths for your plan, such as best case and worst case. This allows you to quickly assess the downstream impact and tradeoffs before committing to changes.
Learn more
about scenarios.
Free
Standard
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Approvals
Add approval steps to your workflows to ensure that reviewers sign off on tasks before they’re advanced to the next stage.
Learn more
about approvals.
Free
Standard
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Custom onboarding
Custom onboarding enables admins to deliver personalized welcome experiences, embed relevant resources, and gain insights on user engagement in Jira.
Learn more.
Free
Standard
Premium
checked
Enterprise
checked
Scale on the Atlassian platform

Unlock AI-powered teamwork with access to Rovo Search, Chat, and specialized Agents and streamline how you plan, track, and deliver your best work.

Manage Preferences
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Accept all
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Back Button

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Accept all
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Always Active

hits.title: Show HN: Tara – A smart and free alternative to Jira
Misconfigured Jira instances exposed data of hundreds of Fortune 500 companies

analysis.name: Jira
analysis.tagline: More projects. More agents. Less chaos.
analysis.value_proposition: Jira orchestrates teams, AI agents, and tools across your tech stack to turn plans into shipped work.
analysis.ideal_customer: Engineering, product, and cross-functional teams at mid-to-large companies managing complex software delivery and project portfolios

features.name: issue tracking
features.description: Create and track individual pieces of work including tasks, bugs, helpdesk tickets, and requests
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited Issues — teams use issues to track individual pieces of work that must be completed

features.name: board view
features.description: Kanban-style board for visualizing and managing work in progress across status columns
features.evidence_quote: Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views — Choose from different views

features.name: backlog management
features.description: Dedicated backlog view for organizing and prioritizing upcoming work
features.evidence_quote: Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Gantt-style timeline for visualizing project schedules and dependencies
features.evidence_quote: Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar-based view for scheduling and date-driven project planning
features.evidence_quote: Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views

features.name: list view
features.description: Flat list view for browsing and managing issues in a structured table format
features.evidence_quote: Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views

features.name: summary view
features.description: Dashboard summary view for high-level project status overview
features.evidence_quote: Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views

features.name: reports and dashboards
features.description: Built-in reports and dashboards for insights on teamwork tracked across any Jira project
features.evidence_quote: Reports and dashboards — Get insights on teamwork tracked in any Jira product or project

features.name: custom workflows
features.description: Configurable workflows defining how work moves from 'to do' to 'done' for any team process
features.evidence_quote: Customizable workflows — Create a custom workflow that helps your team work as efficiently as possible

features.name: automation rules
features.description: No-code automation engine to trigger actions based on events, reducing manual repetitive work
features.evidence_quote: 100 automation rule runs per month — replacing manual, time-consuming work with automated processes

features.name: goals
features.description: Goal-setting feature to align projects and tasks to desired business outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited goals — Create goals to align teams and projects to desired outcomes

features.name: forms
features.description: Drag-and-drop form builder for collecting structured data from teams and stakeholders
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited forms — Create dynamic forms with our drag-and-drop, user-friendly form builder

features.name: project templates
features.description: Pre-built templates across software, marketing, finance, design, sales, ops, HR, and IT use cases
features.evidence_quote: All templates — Software Development, Finance, Marketing, Design, Sales, Operations, Service Management

features.name: sprint planning
features.description: Agile sprint planning for scrum teams to plan and execute time-boxed delivery iterations
features.evidence_quote: Agile Project Management

features.name: user roles and permissions
features.description: Granular access controls to manage what users can create, view, and comment on
features.evidence_quote: User roles and permissions — Control what users can create, view, and comment on in Jira

features.name: external collaboration
features.description: Anonymous access for people outside your organization to view Jira projects
features.evidence_quote: External collaboration — Give people outside your org anonymous access to Jira projects

features.name: multi-region data residency
features.description: Control and specify the geographic region where your content and data are hosted
features.evidence_quote: Multi-region data residency — Specify where your content and data are hosted

features.name: rovo ai agents
features.description: AI agents that use project history and institutional knowledge to perform tasks and deliver outputs
features.evidence_quote: Jira agents use your project history and institutional knowledge to deliver real outputs—not generic suggestions

features.name: rovo search
features.description: AI-powered search across the Atlassian ecosystem for finding relevant work and context
features.evidence_quote: Rovo Search, Chat, and Agents, and integrated AI-powered work features

features.name: rovo chat
features.description: AI chat interface for querying project context, getting summaries, and taking actions
features.evidence_quote: Rovo Search, Chat, and Agents, and integrated AI-powered work features

features.name: ai status updates and summaries
features.description: AI-generated status updates, progress summaries, and team communications via Rovo
features.evidence_quote: Rovo updates status, writes summaries, and communicates progress across your team so you can focus on delivery

features.name: customizable onboarding
features.description: Personalized welcome messaging and resources for new users tailored by team type
features.evidence_quote: Customizable onboarding by team type — Welcome new users with personalized messaging and resources

features.name: cross-team planning
features.description: Plan and track goals, projects, and dependencies across multiple teams in one place
features.evidence_quote: Cross-team planning and dependency management — Plan and track goals, projects, and dependencies in one place

features.name: dependency management
features.description: Track and visualize cross-team dependencies to surface and prevent blockers
features.evidence_quote: Cross-team planning and dependency management — Plan and track goals, projects, and dependencies in one place

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Add custom approval steps to workflows requiring sign-offs before work progresses
features.evidence_quote: Customizable approval processes — Add approval steps to your workflows to get required signoffs

features.name: uptime sla
features.description: Guaranteed service uptime with 99.9% (Premium) and 99.95% (Enterprise) SLAs
features.evidence_quote: 99.9% uptime SLA

features.name: program management
features.description: Coordinate timelines, track deliverables, and ship projects across teams at program scale
features.evidence_quote: Program Management

features.name: campaign management
features.description: Plan campaigns, manage creative workflows, and launch on time for marketing teams
features.evidence_quote: Marketing — Plan campaigns, manage creative workflows, and launch on time

features.name: atlassian mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol integration enabling AI coding tools to read and update Jira work items via CLI
features.evidence_quote: Update work items directly from Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Github Copilot, or any CLI via the Atlassian MCP

features.name: agentic workflow orchestration
features.description: Connect agents from any external system to Jira to keep humans and AI agents in sync
features.evidence_quote: Connect agents from any system and keep humans and agents in sync

features.name: teamwork graph
features.description: Knowledge graph linking teams, work, and goals to surface context within the flow of work
features.evidence_quote: Link teams, work, and goals to unlock context right in your flow of work

features.name: atlassian analytics
features.description: Cross-product analytics aggregating data from the entire Atlassian toolchain for holistic insights
features.evidence_quote: Cross-product insights with Atlassian Analytics and Data Lake — Aggregate data from across your Atlassian toolchain

features.name: data lake
features.description: Centralized data repository aggregating data from all Atlassian products for advanced analytics
features.evidence_quote: Aggregate data from across your Atlassian toolchain for holistic insights that drive better decision making

features.name: advanced admin controls
features.description: Enterprise-level governance controls for managing users and security at scale
features.evidence_quote: Advanced admin controls and security — Manage users and security at scale with advanced governance controls

features.name: shadow it controls
features.description: Detect and manage unauthorized application usage across the organization
features.evidence_quote: advanced governance controls like advanced encryption and Shadow IT controls

features.name: advanced encryption
features.description: Enterprise-grade encryption beyond standard data protection for sensitive workloads
features.evidence_quote: advanced governance controls like advanced encryption and Shadow IT controls

features.name: sso enforcement

differentiators: Atlassian MCP enables AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot) to read/write Jira work items directly from CLI
Rovo AI agents leverage institutional project history and knowledge for context-aware outputs rather than generic suggestions
Teamwork Graph links teams, work, and goals for cross-context intelligence surfaced in the flow of work
Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for both DevOps Platforms and Collaborative Work Management (2025)
3,000+ native integrations plus 7,000+ Marketplace apps from 2,200+ partners
Up to 150 sites in Enterprise for data isolation and administrative autonomy per team
Atlassian Guard Standard included in Enterprise tier for identity and access management
Spring 2026 Release positions Jira as the orchestration layer for human-AI hybrid teams

praised: Our whole dev pipeline and planning process runs through [Jira]. It's driving a lot of the business. — Matt Chester, Senior System Engineer
Agents in Jira raise the floor for what every team can do. Capability becomes a property of the system, not just the individual. — Matthew Hargreaves, Head of Product Delivery
[Jira] makes life easier. [We] can spend time on adding value, not busywork. — Joe Cotant, Senior TPM
Plans gives us a single source of truth where we can plan and track different projects across different teams — Rob Mulvaney
Industry standard with massive ecosystem lock-in; broad enterprise adoption and deep Atlassian integrations
complaints: JIRA is an antipattern (1012 upvotes, 367 comments on HN) — implies Jira encourages dysfunctional overhead and ceremony
I fucking hate Jira (971 upvotes, 526 comments on HN) — widespread developer frustration with UX and complexity
Why Jira Sucks (408 upvotes, 506 comments on HN) — recurring themes of bloat, slow performance, over-engineering
Misconfigured Jira instances exposed data of hundreds of Fortune 500 companies — security and configuration complexity
Open-source alternatives like Plane gaining significant traction (638 + 437 + 406 upvotes across multiple HN threads) signaling market dissatisfaction

free_tier.limits: up to 10 users, 2 GB storage, 100 automation runs/month

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited goals, projects, tasks, forms; all 6 views; reports; 100 automation runs; 2GB storage; up to 10 users

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Rovo AI (Search, Chat, Agents); roles/permissions; external collab; data residency; 1,700 automation runs; 250GB; up to 100k users

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Cross-team planning; dependency mgmt; approval workflows; 1,000 automation runs/user; unlimited storage; 99.9% SLA

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Atlassian Analytics + Data Lake; advanced security; multi-IdP/SCIM/SSO; unlimited automation; up to 150 sites; 99.95% SLA

pricing.notes: Enterprise is annual billing only. Annual saves up to 17% vs monthly. Automation runs are a key tier differentiator: 100/mo free → 1,700/mo standard → 1,000/user/mo premium → unlimited enterprise. Standard pricing ($7.91, $14.54) appears to reflect annual billing rate. Atlassian Guard Standard is bundled into Enterprise.
